Title: Lithium deficiency and the onset of Alzheimer's disease
Key_Finding: Li deficient in AD/MCI brains; sequestered by Aβ plaques; Li orotate reverses pathology in mice

Title: Clinical and biological effects of long-term lithium treatment
Key_Finding: Cognitive stability maintained; increased Aβ42 in CSF at 36 months

Title: Disease-modifying properties of long-term lithium treatment
Key_Finding: Placebo declined on ADAS-Cog; Li group stable; decreased p-tau in CSF

Title: Lithium trial in Alzheimer's disease
Key_Finding: No cognitive improvement; increased serum BDNF

Title: Lithium for Alzheimer's disease: meta-analysis
Key_Finding: Modest favorable cognitive effect; heterogeneity across studies

Title: Lithium and neuroprotection at subtherapeutic concentrations
Key_Finding: Subtherapeutic Li reduces Aβ plaques; improves memory; increases BDNF; inhibits GSK-3β

Title: Association of lithium in drinking water with dementia incidence
Key_Finding: Higher Li in drinking water = lower dementia incidence; dose-response relationship

Title: Lithium as a disease-modifying agent
Key_Finding: Preclinical evidence solid; clinical evidence limited; more effective in prevention than treatment

Title: Lithium for cognitive decline: RCT
Key_Finding: No significant cognitive difference Li vs placebo; well-tolerated

Title: LATTICE Study
Key_Finding: Results published March 2026; feasibility and biomarker outcomes
